question: What is the name of the country with the most car makers?
gold_sql: SELECT T2.CountryName FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN COUNTRIES AS T2 ON T1.Country  =  T2.CountryId GROUP BY T1.Country ORDER BY Count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.col_2 FROM table_2 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_4 GROUP BY T1.col_2 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT T1.col_2 FROM table_2 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_4 GROUP BY T1.col_2 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
